name: Pinecone
description: Monitor Pinecone vector database configuration including index inventory, collection backups, and API access verification for compliance evidence

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Pinecone console at https://app.pinecone.io
2. Select your project
3. Go to the 'API Keys' tab
4. Create or copy an existing API key with at least ReadOnly control plane permissions
5. Paste the API key below

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verify that Pinecone API access is working by listing indexes in the project

checks.name: Index Inventory
checks.description: List all vector indexes in the project with their configuration details including dimensions, metric, and status

checks.name: Collection Inventory
checks.description: List all collections (pod-based index backups) in the project with their status and configuration
